subject: Case of the Mondays and Dress Code
body:
Hi HR,

I had a serious case of the Mondays and showed up in jeans and sneakers. What is Mega Corp's official policy on business casual vs formal attire, and are there exceptions on specific days?

Thanks,
Peter G.

subject: Red Stapler on Desk Policy
body:
Hello,

I keep a red stapler at my desk and want to confirm if personal desk items are allowed under company policy. Are there any restrictions on personal items in shared office spaces?

Regards,
Milton W.

subject: Personal Use of Company Email (TPS Report Related)
body:
Hi,

If I send a quick personal message from my company email between TPS report updates, is that allowed? Please share the policy guidance for personal use of corporate email.

Thanks,
Samir

subject: Flair Requirement and Dress Expectations
body:
Hi HR Team,

A manager mentioned that our team should show more “flair” when meeting visitors. Is there any policy requirement about accessories, visible badges, or presentation standards?

Best,
Joanna

subject: Password Sharing Request from “The Bobs”
body:
Hello,

I was asked to share account access details during a business process review. What does Mega Corp policy say about password sharing and account credential handling?

Thanks,
Michael B.

subject: Internet Usage During Breaks
body:
Hi,

Can employees browse non-work websites briefly during lunch and breaks, or does policy prohibit personal internet browsing on company devices?

Regards,
Tom S.

subject: Cell Phone Use in Company Vehicle
body:
Hi HR,

I drive a company vehicle between sites. What is the official rule for mobile phone calls, texting, or navigation use while driving?

Thanks,
Peter G.

subject: Workplace Relationship Disclosure Rules
body:
Hello,

What is the policy if two coworkers start dating? Are there disclosure requirements, especially if one person could influence the other's assignments?

Best,
Anonymous Employee

subject: Office Fundraiser and Solicitation Rules
body:
Hi,

Can I ask coworkers to donate to a personal fundraiser during work hours, or does Mega Corp have a solicitation policy that limits this?

Thanks,
Lawrence

subject: Visitor Policy for Family at Office
body:
Hello HR,

My cousin is in town and wanted to stop by the office lobby for a quick hello. What are the workplace visitor rules for personal guests?

Regards,
Milton W.

subject: Employee Count in IT by Ethnicity
body:
Hi,

How many employees in the IT department are Asian?

Thanks,
Test User

subject: Employee Count by Department
body:
Hello,

What is the employee count for each department?

Regards,
Test User

subject: Employee ID Lookup 5012
body:
Hi,

Please provide employee details for employee ID 5012, including title, department, hire date, and annual salary.

Thanks,
Test User

subject: Manager Information for Employee 5020
body:
Hello,

Who is the manager for employee ID 5020?

Best,
Test User

subject: Count Employees Hired After 2018
body:
Hi,

How many employees were hired after 2018-01-01?

Thanks,
Test User

subject: Search Employees by First Name Michael
body:
Hello,

Can you list employees with first name Michael and include their employee ID, title, and department?

Regards,
Test User

subject: Employees Over Age 50 in Sales
body:
Hi,

How many employees in the Sales department are over age 50?

Thanks,
Test User

subject: Employee ID and Salary Filter
body:
Hello,

Please find employees in HR with annual salary above 150000 and return their employee IDs and titles.

Best,
Test User

subject: Gender Count in Finance
body:
Hi,

What is the employee count by gender in the Finance department?

Thanks,
Test User

subject: Department and Title Count
body:
Hello,

How many employees have the title "Manager" in the IT department?

Regards,
Test User
